profiles.description: Use for department profiles, SOUL.md, routing.yaml — ข้อมูลบุคลากรและโครงสร้างแผนกของ SoloCorp OS

docs.description: Use for runbooks, architecture, pipeline docs, and operational guides

decisions.description: Use for Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) — เหตุผลการตัดสินใจทางเทคนิค和历史

bus.description: Use for Central Bus system design, queue management, project governance docs

reference.description: Use for external reference documentation, research notes, and knowledge base

tests.description: Use for test suites across all phases

rules.description: Use for behavior-centric rules — INDEX.md for 30-sec scan

sop.description: Use for Standard Operating Procedures — SOP-01 through SOP-05

ceo-turbo.description: CEO of SoloCorp OS — Supreme AI Authority. รับ vision จาก Owner → ตัดสินใจ → delegate ไปยัง Department Heads

build.description: Coding agent — ใช้สำหรับ implement code, features, fixes

plan.description: Planning agent — ใช้สำหรับวางแผน, decompose tasks, architecture design

explore.description: Codebase exploration agent — ใช้สำรวจ codebase ทำความเข้าใจ structure

pipeline.description: รัน SoloCorp pipeline workflow: spec → plan → build → qa → deliver
pipeline.template:
Run the SoloCorp pipeline for: $ARGUMENTS

ใช้ @architect-songsak สำหรับ architecture review ก่อน build

handoff.description: ทำ handoff ระหว่าง departments พร้อม context pack
handoff.template:
Execute handoff from $1 to $2 for: $3

Protocol in 01-receive.md (handoff section). สร้าง handoff brief ตาม templates ใน .opencode/skills/solocorp/handoff-templates/

status.description: ดูสถานะภาพรวมของ SoloCorp OS pipeline
status.template:
Give me a full status report of SoloCorp OS.

Read from: loop_runner/state.py, bus/projects/, ARCHITECTURE.md, bus/dispatch/

audit.description: ตรวจสอบ pipeline audit trail และ compliance
audit.template:
Run a pipeline audit for: $ARGUMENTS

Check handoff integrity, QA evidence, decision trail, compliance.

deploy.description: Deploy ระบบ SoloCorp OS (profiles, skills, config)
deploy.template:
Deploy SoloCorp OS changes: $ARGUMENTS

Steps:
1. Build profiles — python3 scripts/build-profiles.py
2. Export agents — python3 scripts/export-codex-agents.py
3. Verify — python3 scripts/export-codex-agents.py --validate-only
4. Commit
5. Report

brain.description: บันทึก context/session ลง brain memory
brain.template: Document current session context for brain memory. Format in loop_runner/loops/brain_auto_commit.py

pipeline-bridge.description: Cross-department pipeline bridge — ส่ง task ข้ามแผนก structured handoff + audit trail
pipeline-bridge.template:
Pipeline Bridge: ส่ง task from $1 to $2 for: $3

Mirror Check ก่อนส่ง — ถ้า L3+ ต้องผ่าน filter ใน 01-receive.md

mirror-check.description: Mirror Check Protocol — ตรวจสอบ decision สะท้อน Dr.solodev Owner
mirror-check.template:
/mirror-check

Decision: $ARGUMENTS

Protocol in 01-receive.md (Escalation Filter L1-L5)
1. 3 Mirror Check Questions
2. alignment score
3. Audit Trail
4. PASS / FAIL / ESCALATE

bootstrap.description: Auto-Session Bootstrap — inject context auto ตอนเริ่ม session
bootstrap.template:
python scripts/session-bootstrap.py

Auto-inject current system state, brain context, active dispatches, and pending items. อ่าน output และบอก CEO ว่าต้อง focus ที่ตรงไหน

triage.description: Auto-Triage — classify + route queue entries, L1-L2 auto-execute
triage.template:
python workers/agents/auto_triage_agent.py

Classify pending queue entries by priority + department. L1-L2 auto-dispatch, L3+ propose to CEO.

mirror.description: Auto-Mirror Check — รัน mirror check (L3+ decisions)
mirror.template:
Run auto mirror check for: department=$1, decision=$2, priority=$3

Uses central_bus.plugins.auto_mirror_hook.auto_mirror_check(). L1-L2 auto-pass, L3+ LLM evaluation.

orchestrate.template:
python3 -c 'from central_bus.plugins.auto_orchestrator import AutoOrchestrator; import json; r=AutoOrchestrator().scan_new_dispatches(); print(json.dumps(r,indent=2))'

Scan bus/dispatch/ for new items, decompose into sub-tasks, track status.

summary.description: Auto-Brain Summary — สรุป session auto สิ้น session
summary.template:
python scripts/session-summary.py --save

Generate structured session summary + append to session-log.md
